text:
Market today: The mood is cautious, with a stark warning about an impending "Lehman Bros. moment" for the AI bubble, directly threatening your tech/chip-heavy book. Retail sales show some economic resilience, but the tech sector faces headwinds.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down 34.95% with a "SELL" status and leveraged exposure. SPAL, also leveraged, is down 37.57% and needs review. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged tech positions (SOXL, SPAL) and general tech sector sentiment for signs of the predicted AI bubble "moment."

Bottom line: Focus on risk management and reducing leveraged tech exposure in this uncertain environment.
plays: Review SOXL (SELL, -34.95%) to reduce leveraged tech exposure; ensure a relevant stop is in place or consider trimming.
Evaluate SPAL (NEW, -37.57%) given its leveraged nature and significant loss.
No new buys today - hold and watch, especially given the AI bubble warnings.
